I’ve been quiet on LinkedIn, but I have not been disconnected. I’ve been watching something unfold that deserves a deeper conversation. Cybersecurity is not just about protecting data. In healthcare, it is about protecting care, continuity, and trust. As healthcar &nbsp;&nbsp; LinkedIn
